ai_summary: Apollo Pipes Limited (APL) has approved a two-step amalgamation to integrate its subsidiary, Kisan Mouldings Limited (KML), and KML's wholly-owned subsidiary, KML Tradelinks Private Limited (KTPL), into APL. This strategic move aims to achieve operational efficiencies, economies of scale, and a streamlined business structure within the plastics and pipes sector. A material impact is the dilution of the promoter's stake in APL from 51.72% to 49.20%, transferring majority ownership to public shareholders and potentially signifying a shift in governance dynamics.
